mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO weather_log ( district_code, base_time, temperature, day_offset, cloud_low, cloud_mid, cloud_high, ghi, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
(#{item.districtCode}, #{item.baseTime}, #{item.temperature}, #{item.dayOffset}, #{item.cloudLow}, #{item.cloudMid}, #{item.cloudHigh}, #{item.ghi}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE temperature = COALESCE(VALUES(temperature), temperature), cloud_low = COALESCE(VALUES(cloud_low), cloud_low), cloud_mid = COALESCE(VALUES(cloud_mid), cloud_mid), cloud_high = COALESCE(VALUES(cloud_high), cloud_high), ghi = COALESCE(VALUES(ghi), ghi), updated_at = COALESCE(VALUES(updated_at), updated_at)
